channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania Prisons prepare for challenging Mainland Premier League clash with Yanga
item.description: Tanzania Prisons FC is set to face defending champions Young Africans S.C. (Yanga) in a Mainland Tanzania Premier League match on Thursday. Newly appointed coach Shadrack Nsajigwa has admitted the tas...

item.title: Alex Eala eliminated from Indian Wells after straight-sets defeat to Linda Nosková
item.description: Filipina tennis star Alex Eala's impressive run at the BNP Paribas Open in Indian Wells came to an end on March 11, 2026, as she suffered a decisive loss to Czech player Linda Nosková in the Round of ...

item.title: ASHA Microfinance Bank honours women entrepreneurs with outreach and new ambassador
item.description: ASHA Microfinance Bank don mark International Women’s Day for Mushin Market with big celebration wey show say dem dey serious about empowering women wey dey run business. Market leaders, traders, and ...

item.title: Anthropic to establish Australian operations and invest in local data infrastructure
item.description: Anthropic, the US-based artificial intelligence company known for its agent coding platform, is officially expanding into Australia and New Zealand. The firm plans to base its regional operations in S...

item.title: Hariharan Discusses the Rise of Independent Music and His Ghazal Journey
item.description: Renowned singer Hariharan, celebrated for his versatility across genres, continues to place ghazals at the heart of his musical journey. His latest album, 'Jaan Meri', features five ghazals with lyric...

item.title: US destroys Iranian mine-laying vessels in Strait of Hormuz as Iran launches major missile barrage and Trump issues stark warning
item.description: The ongoing war between the US, Israel, and Iran has entered its second week, with significant escalations reported on 11 March 2026. Iran launched what its state media described as the 'most intense ...

item.title: WA windsurfer escapes unharmed after white shark damages board
item.description: A windsurfer had a fortunate escape off Wobiri Beach on the Exmouth coast after a suspected three-metre great white shark bit a chunk out of his foil board early yesterday morning. The incident occurr...

item.title: LAUSD Board Denies Charter Renewal, Approves Union Contracts Amid Carvalho Investigation
item.description: On March 10, 2026, the Los Angeles Unified School District (LAUSD) held its first public board meeting following FBI raids on Superintendent Alberto Carvalho's home and office, though Carvalho remains...

item.title: Kano State Plans Distribution of 3.5 Million Meals for Ramadan 2026
item.description: Kano State Government don announce say dem dey plan distribute over 3.5 million meals under 2026 Ramadan Feeding Programme. Alhaji Ahmed Tijjani, Commissioner for Religious Affairs wey also be Chairma...

item.title: Bureau of Customs turns over P102 million from auction of Discaya contractors' luxury cars to Treasury
item.description: The Bureau of Customs (BOC), led by Commissioner Ariel Nepomuceno, has remitted over P102 million to the Bureau of the Treasury. This amount was collected from the public auctions of nine luxury vehic...

item.title: Amazon Implements Senior Engineer Approval for AI-Assisted Changes Following System Outages
item.description: Amazon recently held a major meeting with its engineering teams to address a series of website and infrastructure outages. The company identified a pattern of incidents that involved changes assisted ...

item.title: US Plans First New Oil Refinery in 50 Years with Reliance Industries Investment
item.description: On Tuesday, US President Donald Trump announced that Reliance Industries, India’s biggest privately held energy conglomerate, is supporting a deal to build the first major oil refinery in the United S...

item.title: Parliament Revises Safaricom Sale Plan to Protect Employees and Partners
item.description: Kenya's Parliament has amended the government's plan to sell up to 15 percent of its stake in Safaricom PLC, introducing new measures to protect employees and business partners. The joint report from ...

item.title: UAE Intercepts Iranian Missiles Targeting US Bases and Cities
item.description: The United Arab Emirates reported being under Iranian missile attack amid escalating tensions in the ongoing 2026 Iran-US-Israel war. This live update from The Wall Street Journal details a specific i...

item.title: Zendaya Sparks Wedding Rumours with Gold Band at Louis Vuitton Show
item.description: At the final day of Paris Fashion Week, Hollywood actress Zendaya appeared at the Louis Vuitton show in an elegant white outfit, accompanied by a discreet gold band on her wedding finger. Fans immedia...

item.title: Treasury confirms debt peak, focus now shifts to effective service delivery
item.description: The South African Treasury, led by Finance Minister Enoch Godongwana, has confirmed that the country's public debt has reached its peak, signalling a critical turning point for the national budget. Wh...

item.title: Dodoma Pushes Apple Farming to Boost Local Economy
item.description: Dodoma Regional Commissioner, Ms Rosemary Senyamule, is calling on residents of Dodoma to start apple farming as a way to strengthen the region's economy. During a visit to Chamwino District, she tour...

item.title: Kenyan Opposition Urged to Give Practical Policy Proposals for National Progress
item.description: The piece by David M. Kigo reflects on Kenya’s continued governance challenges since the 2024 Gen Z uprising, which exposed weaknesses within the UDA government. The author notes that the nation is st...

item.title: Several Metro Manila LGUs Implement Four-Day Workweek to Conserve Energy
item.description: In response to rising oil prices and a directive from President Marcos to promote energy-saving measures, multiple local government units (LGUs) in Metro Manila have started implementing shorter workw...

item.title: Federal Government Adds Five-Year Review and Oversight to Immigration Bill Following Senate Input
item.description: The federal government has introduced amendments to Bill C-12, Canada's immigration and border legislation, to address concerns raised by the Senate, particularly regarding asylum seekers. Key changes...
